title: My Girl
why_this_song: My Girl by The Temptations (1964) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: What can make me feel this way
My girl, my girl, my girl
I don't need no money, fortune, or fame

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "girl" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "girl" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I've got sunshine on a cloudy day

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Than the birds in the trees

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Temptations one question about "My Girl", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Temptations sobre "My Girl", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "My Girl" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "My Girl" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "My Girl" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "My Girl" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "My Girl" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "My Girl" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
